arts.ttl: Chelsea face 'competition' from European giant for Premier League striker as Enzo Maresca aims to improve attack
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly on the lookout for a new striker in the summer, but they may have to brace themselves for competition from a European giant for a key target.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Chelsea Maresca SACK TRUTH, Arsenal DEAL CLOSE, Liverpool SELL Nunez
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Chelsea Maresca SACK TRUTH, Arsenal DEAL CLOSE, Liverpool SELL Nunez Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Enzo Maresca, Myles Lewis-Skelly and Darwin Nunez .

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk breaks silence with Chelsea message amid doping ban
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk was provisionally suspended from football in December after he tested positive for a banned performance-enhancing substance, meldonium

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres' preferred move between Arsenal & Chelsea revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea both have long-term interest in Sporting CP's relentless goalscorer Viktor Gyokeres.

arts.ttl: Insistence player will consider Fulham and West Ham transfers – Club hoping to ‘sell him back’ to Premier League
arts.sum: Fulham and West Ham United are among the ‘interested parties’ in Bayern Munich midfielder Joao Palhinha, who may end up valuing a return to the Premier League this summer. That’s according to journalist Christian Falk speaking to BILD, who has revealed that both sides have a good chance of getting the midfielder back to the The post Insistence player will consider Fulham and West Ham transfers – Club hoping to ‘sell him back’ to Premier League appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'It feels good': Nicolas Jackson lists three reasons why he loves playing for Chelsea
arts.sum: The striker seems at home at Stamford Bridge 🏠️

arts.ttl: West Ham 1-1 Southampton: Chelsea loanee Lesley Ugochukwu's extra-time equaliser denies Hammers first win since February after Jarrod Bowen opener
arts.sum: Southampton snatched a late point at the London Stadium through Chelsea loanee Lesley Ugochukwu, denying the hosts a first Premier League win since February.

arts.ttl: Fantasy Challenge: Double points in Fulham v Chelsea
arts.sum: Therefore managers will need to decide between investing in these players, investing in those teams like Liverpool who have an excellent single-Gameweek fixture and won't score double points or opting for Chelsea and Fulham assets who will have their points doubled. This week, players from the west London derby between Fulham and Chelsea will score DOUBLE points, with managers selecting a 5-a-side team using an unlimited budget.
